testcase.name: test_isolation
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_learning_journeys.py:33: in secondary_headers assert r.status_code == 201, f"Signup failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: Signup failed: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"test_lj_87cc3b21@hymn.test","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}}]} E assert 422 == 201 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_endpoint_ok[/outcome-types]
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_learning_journeys.py:159: in test_endpoint_ok assert r.status_code == 200, f"{path} -> {r.status_code} {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: /outcome-types -> 404 {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
